name: Museu de Menorca – El Pequeño Museo (Maó)
description: The island's museum, set in a former convent in Maó, with a children's space ('El Pequeño Museo', the Little Museum) where you learn through play: a mock archaeological dig and games about pirates and Talayotic Menorca. The perfect cultural refuge for a hot or rainy day.

highlights: play in 'El Pequeño Museo': a mock archaeological dig and history games
explore the collection of prehistoric and Talayotic Menorca (World Heritage)
an indoor plan on foot in the centre of Maó, ideal in poor weather
